sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_series_data (id UInt32, values Array(Float64), period UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, seriesDecomposeSTL(values, period) AS components FROM time_series_data WHERE id NOT LIKE '2';

SELECT id, (SELECT count() FROM time_series_data WHERE NOT (id IN (SELECT id FROM time_series_data WHERE values[1] NOT LIKE '10.1'))) AS not_like_check, seriesDecomposeSTL(values, period) AS components FROM time_series_data GROUP BY id HAVING not_like_check > 0;

WITH (SELECT seriesDecomposeSTL(values, period) FROM time_series_data WHERE period > 2) AS stl_components SELECT arrayJoin(stl_components) AS component, id FROM time_series_data WHERE component[3] NOT LIKE '20.45';
CREATE TABLE temp_series AS SELECT id, arrayJoin(seriesDecomposeSTL(values, period)) AS decomposed FROM time_series_data;
SELECT id, countIf(decomposed[1] NOT LIKE 'NULL') AS valid_seasonal FROM temp_series GROUP BY id HAVING valid_seasonal > 1;
ALTER TABLE time_series_data ADD COLUMN description String;
UPDATE time_series_data SET description = 'Test' WHERE id = 1;
